sentences.target: Wir fliegen morgen auf die Insel.

translations.de: Wir fliegen morgen auf die Insel.
translations.en: We are flying to the island tomorrow.
translations.fr: Nous prenons l’avion pour l’île demain.
translations.ko: 내일 그 섬으로 비행기를 타고 가요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天坐飞机去那个岛。
translations.yue: 我哋聽日坐飛機去嗰個島。
translations.pt: Amanhã vamos para a ilha de avião.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi bay đến hòn đảo đó.
translations.nl: We vliegen morgen naar het eiland.
translations.hi: हम कल उस द्वीप पर विमान से जा रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi flyr til øya i morgen.
translations.id: Besok kami terbang ke pulau itu.
translations.sv: Vi flyger till ön i morgon.
translations.da: Vi flyver til øen i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日その島へ飛行機で行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; functions as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; predicates the action.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates time (future: the next day).
Preposition introducing a directional prepositional phrase; governs accusative (motion towards a goal).
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Insel' under a directional 'auf'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'auf' indicating destination.

sentences.target: Auf der Insel ist es heute sehr windig.
sentences.reading: /aʊf deːɐ̯ ˈɪnzəl ɪst ɛs ˈhɔʏtə zeːɐ̯ ˈvɪndɪç/

translations.de: Auf der Insel ist es heute sehr windig.
translations.ipa: /aʊf deːɐ̯ ˈɪnzəl ɪst ɛs ˈhɔʏtə zeːɐ̯ ˈvɪndɪç/
translations.en: It is very windy on the island today.
translations.es: Hoy en la isla hace mucho viento.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, il y a beaucoup de vent sur l’île.
translations.ko: 오늘 그 섬에는 바람이 많이 불어요.
translations.he: היום באי יש רוח חזקה מאוד.
translations.vi: Hôm nay trên đảo gió rất mạnh.
translations.ar: اليوم الرياح قوية جدًا على الجزيرة.
translations.nl: Vandaag waait het hard op het eiland.
translations.hu: Ma a szigeten nagyon erős a szél.
translations.hi: आज द्वीप पर बहुत तेज़ हवा चल रही है.
translations.nb: Det blåser mye på øya i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini angin sangat kencang di pulau itu.
translations.sv: Det blåser väldigt mycket på ön i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi pe insulă bate vântul foarte tare.
translations.da: I dag blæser det meget på øen.
translations.ja: 今日は島では風がとても強いです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase; governs dative (static location).
Definite article, dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Insel' in a locative PP.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'auf' indicating location.
Finite copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject pronoun to predicate adjective.
Personal/impersonal pronoun, 3rd person singular neuter; expletive/dummy subject in weather-like statement.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates the time (today).
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'windig'.
Predicate adjective (short form), positive degree; complement of the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Meine Tante lebt auf einer Insel.

translations.de: Meine Tante lebt auf einer Insel.
translations.en: My aunt lives on an island.
translations.es: Mi tía vive en una isla.
translations.fr: Ma tante habite sur une île.
translations.vi: Dì tôi sống trên một hòn đảo.
translations.nl: Mijn tante woont op een eiland.
translations.hi: मेरी मौसी एक द्वीप पर रहती हैं.
translations.el: Η θεία μου μένει σε ένα νησί.
translations.nb: Tanten min bor på en øy.
translations.id: Tante saya tinggal di sebuah pulau.
translations.sv: Min moster bor på en ö.
translations.ro: Mătușa mea locuiește pe o insulă.
translations.da: Min moster bor på en ø.
translations.ja: 私の叔母は島に住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative singular feminine; modifies 'Tante' as a possessor.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicates a state of living.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase; governs dative.
Indefinite article, dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Insel' within the PP.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'auf' indicating location.

translations.en: I am looking for a quiet island.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một hòn đảo yên tĩnh.
translations.hi: मैं एक शांत द्वीप ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en rolig øy.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari pulau yang tenang.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en lugn ö.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en rolig ø.
translations.ja: 静かな島を探しています。

Indefinite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of the direct object NP.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Insel'; inflected (-e) to agree with feminine accusative singular.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'suche'.
